content: /remote-control is active. Code in CLI or at https://claude.ai/code/REDACTED

content.text:
Someone has an issue using skills in Moltis, his message:

Next thing I'd like to understand is how moltis reads its skills. I seem to run into an issue where it wants to run a mcp filesystem tool to read the skill. Is that the intended path? It seems wrong to me. It gets into a fugue trying to read the skill and makes up stuff based on memory or anything it can read instead of the skills folder in .moltis

How is it working currently? How can we improve that? Why the screenshots shows it's not working for him.
